Markdown Resume

A resume generated from Markdown and styled for web presentation.

Role

Content & Web Publication

Tools

  • Markdown
  • HTML
  • CSS

Overview

A resume generated from Markdown and styled for web presentation.

Problem

Make resume content easy to update while keeping a bold visual style.

Process

Use Markdown as the source of truth and publish a formatted PDF/Web view.

Final Solution

A clean resume workflow that can be edited in plain text and previewed in the browser.

Images

Open live project

Reflection

This approach makes resume updates fast, while preserving a custom portfolio presentation.

Overview

This project uses Markdown-based content so updates are simple and maintainable.

Details

Add notes on the resume structure, layout choices, or how you want viewers to interact with the PDF link.
